description: LLM-as-judge evaluator. Pass-through asset that takes an upstream agent / LLM output and scores it on configurable feedbacks (answer_relevance, groundedness, context_relevance, harmfulness, helpfulness, coherence). Same conceptual model as TruLens — without the framework dep.

outputs.description: Upstream payload + 'evaluations' field containing per-metric score (0.0-1.0) and reason.

evaluations.label: Evaluations
evaluations.description: Which feedbacks to compute. Valid: answer_relevance, groundedness, context_relevance, harmfulness, helpfulness, coherence.

answer_jsonpath.label: Answer Path
answer_jsonpath.description: Dot-path in upstream to the answer string. Default 'final_answer' (matches *_agent output).

question_jsonpath.label: Question Path
question_jsonpath.description: Dot-path to the question. If unset, pulls first user message from upstream's transcript.

context_jsonpath.label: Context Path
context_jsonpath.description: Dot-path to retrieved context (for groundedness / context_relevance).
